<title>{% block title %}{% endblock title %} - Twilio Appointment Reminders</title>
This demo application will show you how to implement SMS appointment reminders with Twilio in Django.
> Generated by the Telnyx Twilio Migration Skill
- **Approach**: Direct SDK migration (Twilio → Telnyx Python SDK)
| No residual Twilio imports | PASS | All Python files checked |
| No Twilio API URLs | PASS | No hardcoded URLs found |
| No Twilio env vars | PASS | All environment variables migrated |
| 6742ef1 | chore: add Telnyx SDK alongside Twilio, update env vars |
- [ ] **Number porting**: Submit porting order if moving production number from Twilio to Telnyx
- [ ] **Cancel Twilio**: After validation period, cancel Twilio account
| Phase 6 (Cleanup) | ✅ PASS - Twilio SDK removed, README updated |

| Twilio Product | Telnyx Replacement | Files Affected | Complexity | Notes |
